name.en-US: On the Duties of the Clergy

sources.description: Translated by H. de Romestin, E. de Romestin and H.T.F. Duckworth. From Nicene and Post-Nicene Fathers, Second Series, Vol. 10, Edited by Philip Schaff and Henry Wace, Buffalo, NY: Christian Literature Publishing Co 1896. Revised and edited for New Advent by Kevin Knight.
